title: Countries
description: Schema for the countries travel risk data array used in Vaksinomat

riskProfiles.description: List of vaccine-preventable disease risk profile identifiers relevant for travellers

malariaRisk.description: Overall malaria risk level for the country

malariaZones.description: Norwegian-language description of malaria risk zones; null if malariaRisk is none

yellowFeverRequirement.description: Yellow fever entry or vaccination requirement for this country

yellowFeverRecommended.description: True if yellow fever vaccination is recommended by FHI for travel to this country regardless of entry requirement

fhiPageUrl.description: URL to the FHI country-specific travel health page

lastScrapedDate.description: ISO 8601 date when this country data was last sourced or reviewed

dataVersion.description: Semantic version of this country record's data format
